response.original_title: Can I cancel ExpressVPN and get my money back? {Complete Answer}
response.overview: Yes, you can cancel ExpressVPN and receive a full refund 1 (855 )) 783 7555 provided you submit your request within their 30-day money-back 1 (855 )) 783 7555 guarantee window. To start the process, you should log 1 (855 )) 783 7555 into your account dashboard on the official website and 1 (855 )) 783 7555 disable the "Automatic Renewal" setting under the Subscription tab. 1 (855 )) 783 7555 However, simply turning off the renewal does not automatically 1 (855 )) 783 7555 trigger a refund; you must explicitly contact their support 1 (855 )) 783 7555 team to request your money back. For immediate assistance 1 (855 )) 783 7555 and to ensure your refund is authorized, you can 1 (855 )) 783 7555 call 1 (855 )) 783 7555 to speak with a billing 1 (855 )) 783 7555 agent who can verify your transaction details in real-time.
